decisions.title: Use markdown-yaml-json as separate operating layers
decisions.rationale: The source operating model explicitly separates thinking, contract, and execution layers to reduce ambiguity across sessions and agents.

decisions.title: Preserve current billing domain naming during scaffold setup
decisions.rationale: The architecture blueprint uses invoice-oriented examples, but the live repo uses billing. Renaming is deferred until an explicit migration task exists.

decisions.title: Treat the scaffold pass as preparatory and non-runtime
decisions.rationale: This pass establishes docs, contracts, prompts, and execution state without performing the full app, features, or components refactor.
